positive: A majestic, ethereal mandala formed by bioluminescent deep-sea flora and cosmic nebulae. The composition must feature a central, symmetrical 'Eye of Atlantis' glowing brightly against a dark, midnight blue and royal purple background. Use strong radial symmetry and clean silhouettes. The artwork should depict stylized, crystalline elements and swirling cosmic dust trails that contrast sharply with the smooth, dark void. Style is hyper-detailed vector art mixed with deep fantasy illustration. Use dramatic rim lighting to emphasize the glowing edges of the flora. The overall mood is mystical, serene, and powerful. Ideal for a screen-printed, high-contrast apparel design.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, noise, text, watermark, messy, dirty, realistic photo, photography, signatures, logos, trademark, extra limbs, fused fingers, bad anatomy, disfigured, ugly, childish
